direct_property_monitoring._note: Direct properties are valued quarterly via appraisal (not daily repricing). No daily VaR treatment. LTV, rental yield, and vacancy are primary risk indicators.

stress_scenarios._note: Stress scenarios applied to direct property portfolio only. Listed REITs and FX hedges retain daily market-data treatment.

_note_mixed_treatment: This fund contains direct properties (quarterly appraisal), listed REITs (daily market data), FX hedges (daily), and cash. Current policy treats as single mixed fund. Sleeve-based risk analysis is deferred to future ticket.
